title: bromus hordeaceus var. intermedius
intro: Bromus hordeaceus var. intermedius, also known as intermediate brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of intermediate brome include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, the seeds of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
